description: The EyeRotationDriver component can control the rotation of slots using the data from an EyeManager.

fields.EyeManager: The source of the eye rotation data.
fields.EyeMotionScale: How much to multiply the target rotation by before applying it to an Eye.
fields.EyeMotionExp: The exponent. This makes the eye rotate more or less as it reaches higher rotation target values.
fields.MaxSwing: The maximum amount the eyes can rotate in degrees from forward facing.
fields.Eyes: A list of eyes to drive the rotation of.

usage: Set up automatically on avatars that are made using the Avatar Creator.
